title: blaeria glabra
intro: Blaeria glabra, also known as the smooth bog-rosemary, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the peat bogs of Ireland and the UK. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blaeria glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Blaeria glabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
